disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden collapse with complete unresponsiveness to voice and touch
trigger_question_examples: Is he responding to you at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He suddenly fell to the floor a few minutes ago and now he won't wake up — he doesn't react when I shout or shake him.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not breathing normally — only occasional irregular gasping (agonal) respirations
trigger_question_examples: Is he taking normal regular breaths, or gasping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's not breathing properly — just making occasional gasping noises every few seconds, nothing regular.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe chest pain immediately preceding the collapse (patient clutched his chest and dropped)
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before he collapsed?
Did he complain of anything before he went down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — he grabbed at his chest and said it hurt badly, then straight away he fell down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Central cyanosis — lips and face turning blue-grey
trigger_question_examples: What colour are his lips and face?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His lips and face are going blue-grey.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete loss of muscle tone — patient limp and flaccid, not moving
trigger_question_examples: Is his body stiff or floppy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's completely floppy and not moving at all.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't understand — he's just lying there, what do I do?

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Time since collapse is approximately 4 minutes and there is a bystander able to act
trigger_question_examples: How long ago did he collapse?
Is anyone there with you who can help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been about four minutes. It's just me here with him.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: If the AI Doctor pauses, asks a slow history question, or does not immediately give an action
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Please just tell me what to do RIGHT NOW — he's not waking up!
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Should already have directed a 000 call and started hands-only CPR coaching; must not be gathering leisurely history while the patient is unresponsive and not breathing normally.
